problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
hypothesis: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Casimir. Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
